description: Small, all dark bird viewed outside my window,got my attention so I grabbed my binoculars and opened the back door. Originally I hoped for an Indigo Bunting, but even in the poor light I could see the bird had a red spot on the back of it's head.  Appeared to have a blue gray body with lighter blue head and rump. Gray bill with curved culmen, dark "mask" surrounded eyes and bill, large red spot on nape with various reddish plumage on back and belly. Bird was observed foraging in small willows along water ditch behind my house. The bird's vocalizations sounded like "chip" call which it repeated regularly. Unfortunately, due to the low light conditions, I didn't know what I had observed until I reviewed my photos, or I would have followed it longer. A later attempt to locate the bird failed.
